description: Building enterprise web applications for major automotive brands using the GRAND stack. Performing thorough code reviews, writing and updating E2E/unit tests, and contributing practical input to estimates and technical decisions.

Developed two production web apps for car-dealer networks using Vue.js and TypeScript. Collaborated closely with designers to translate Figma concepts into scalable, responsive UI components and refactored legacy code into clean, typed components.

Built websites end-to-end using React and TypeScript. Created UX/UI designs and translated them into working components, connected websites to headless CMS platforms such as Strapi, and handled long-term maintenance.

role: Senior Digital Project Manager / Front-end Developer
description: Delivered digital projects for global clients including BMW Motorsport, JDE, Phillips, Bayer and Sanofi. Combined project management with hands-on JavaScript development and supported leadership on technology strategy and team processes.
Lived and worked across various hospitality roles and volunteered in sustainable agriculture and nature-protection projects. Developed strong intercultural communication and adaptability.
Maintained and updated production websites for Ford Motor Company across the European market.

role: Front-end Developer / Graphic Designer / Flash Animator
description: Created websites and animated banners. Delivered both digital and print design projects.
